payload.main_subject: Maintenance Agreement Signed Between Acme Energia and NovaGrid Solutions

entities.source_text: Acme Energia signed a maintenance agreement with NovaGrid Solutions for the Porto Alegre substation.
Acme Energia signed a maintenance agreement with NovaGrid Solutions for the Porto Alegre substation.

extracted_fields.evidence: On March 12, 2026, Acme Energia signed a maintenance agreement with NovaGrid Solutions for the Porto Alegre substation.

topics.title: Phase 5 Progress Update
key_points: first UI panel added to Streamlit app
priority on improving grounding and output quality
supporting_evidence: The structured outputs foundation has been implemented with task schemas, a registry, JSON parsing, and validation.
A first UI panel was added to the Streamlit app so users can run extraction, summary, checklist, and CV analysis.

payload.executive_summary: Phase 5 of the project has seen the implementation of a structured outputs foundation and the addition of a UI panel for running various analyses. However, prompt quality remains uneven, and efforts are prioritized towards improving grounding and output quality.
key_insights: current priority is to improve grounding and document-context usage

payload.title: Project Release Candidate Preparation Checklist
payload.description: A comprehensive checklist to ensure all necessary steps are taken before approving a new project release candidate.

items.title: Verify Changelog
items.description: Ensure the changelog is up-to-date and accurate for the current release candidate.

items.title: Run Automated Tests
items.description: Execute all automated tests to ensure the release candidate meets quality standards.

items.title: Update Environment Examples
items.description: Review and update any environment examples to reflect the latest changes in the release candidate.

items.title: Validate Streamlit Startup
items.description: Ensure that the Streamlit application starts without errors and all components are functioning as expected.

items.title: Check Structured Output Tasks
items.description: Verify that all structured output tasks are correctly implemented and tested.

items.title: Tag Release in Git
items.description: Create a git tag for the release candidate and push it to the repository.

content.text: AI Engineer at Orion Labs (Jan 2024 to Present)
Data Science Intern at Vento Analytics (Jul 2023 to Dec 2023)

strengths: AI engineer focused on retrieval-augmented generation, document intelligence, and local LLM applications

payload.snippet_summary: The code processes and normalizes scores from a list of items, then calculates the average score.
payload.main_purpose: To normalize scores within a valid range and compute their average.

detected_issues.title: Too much logic in one function
detected_issues.description: The `normalize_scores` function mixes input validation, retrieval, and rendering in a single block of code.
detected_issues.evidence: Function `normalize_scores` handles parsing, validation, and UI output together.
detected_issues.recommendation: Split orchestration and rendering into separate helpers.

readability_improvements: Use more explicit variable names for score retrieval
refactor_plan: Extract normalization logic into a helper function
Add schema-level tests to ensure data integrity
test_suggestions: Add a unit test for malformed JSON responses in `normalize_scores`
risk_notes: Provider failures currently propagate as generic runtime errors, which may hide specific issues.
